_comment: Canonical single source of truth for signal IDs + weights, shared by the TS extension and the Python eval port. Adding a new signal: define it here once, then both `extension/src/signals/*.ts` and `eval/src/localphish_eval/rules.py / dom_features.py` must read its weight via the loader (never inline). Mirror-drift between the two languages was the structural risk called out in Week 16 §10 條 23; this file resolves it.

url.ip_as_host.description: hostname is a raw IP literal

url.punycode_brand_lookalike.description: decoded punycode resembles a known brand

url.subdomain_brand_abuse.description: known brand string embedded in subdomain

url.gov_tw_substring_abuse.description: hostname contains gov.tw but eTLD+1 is not .gov.tw

url.gov_tw_pseudo_tld.description: eTLD+1 uses gov.tw as a fake prefix

url.gov_tw_hyphen_variant.description: domain label is gov-tw / govtw / tw-gov / twgov

url.reverse_proxy_fqdn.description: hostname embeds an entire brand FQDN as a subdomain (Evilginx pattern)

url.reverse_proxy_hyphen_fqdn.description: hyphen-flattened brand FQDN embedded in host

url.phishlet_endpoint.description: OAuth/OIDC well-known path on a non-IDP host

url.bloomfilter_blacklist_hit.description: URL hits the on-device 165/TWCERT bloom filter — Taiwan official phish-URL feed

dom.password_no_tls.description: password field served over plain http://

dom.password_cross_etld1_post.description: password posts to a different eTLD+1

dom.otp_cross_etld1_post.description: OTP posts to a different eTLD+1

dom.card_cross_etld1_post.description: credit-card posts to a different eTLD+1

dom.tw_pii_combo.description: page collects 身分證字號 + 卡號 + OTP on a non-allowlisted host

dom.tw_national_id_cross_etld1_post.description: 身分證字號 field posts to a different eTLD+1

dom.hidden_iframes.description: per-iframe weight for inline hidden iframes (capped)

dom.many_foreign_scripts.description: page loads scripts from >5 distinct foreign eTLD+1s

dom.cross_strait_terms.description: TW-claiming page sprinkles mainland Chinese terms

dom.cross_strait_terms_strong.description: >= 3 distinct mainland terms on a TW-claiming page

dom.cloaking_verify_wall_strong.description: verify wall + body near-empty + zero forms (cloaked)

dom.favicon_brand_cdn_mismatch.description: favicon URL points at a known brand CDN but page eTLD+1 doesn't match that brand

dom.favicon_brand_canonical_mismatch.description: favicon URL is a canonical brand eTLD+1 but page eTLD+1 is unrelated

dom.tag_char_in_text.description: visible text contains Unicode tag chars
